name: io.github.frmoded/forge-mcp
title: Forge MCP
description: MCP server for the Forge E-- library note catalog + Recipe authoring loop (compile / run / commit). Composes generative music via E-- (a small DSL that compiles to Python running music21).

packageArguments.name: --port
packageArguments.description: Local port for the forge-mcp Streamable HTTP transport.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_TRANSPILE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the forge-transpile service. Provides /catalog, /compile, /run, /resolve-slot endpoints backing the read/author tools.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_VAULT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Local vault directory used by forge_read_notes_in_vault + forge_commit_recipe. Must exist and be writable.

environmentVariables.name: FORGE_MCP_BEARER
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token forwarded to forge-transpile. Rotate by updating FORGE_TRANSPILE_SECRET on the upstream service and re-setting this. Dev fallback only when clients don't set Authorization on each request.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.notes: Manifest hand-authored per drain 2026-07-14-1630. Repository, PyPI package, and Registry submission all depend on driver-side auth (GitHub repo creation, twine upload, registry publish); this manifest is the payload the driver submits once those preconditions are met.
